subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have sent unto thee, by the hand of Sin, a glorious Book, and when Shin appeared, these verses were revealed once again [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارسلنا الیک بید السین کتابا کریما لما اتی الشین نزلت هذه الایات مره اخری
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
